videos.headline: Cam Skattebo runs it in for Arizona State
videos.description: Cam Skattebo punches it in from close range to give Arizona State an early lead vs. Arizona.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Cam Skattebo runs it in for Arizona State) 2024/11/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Cam Skattebo powers in his second TD of the game for Sun Devils
videos.description: Cam Skattebo charges into the end zone for his second touchdown of the game for Arizona State vs. Arizona.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Cam Skattebo powers in his second TD of the game for Sun Devils) 2024/11/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jordyn Tyson hauls it in for Arizona State TD
videos.description: Jordyn Tyson brings the pass down and into the end zone to pad Arizona State's lead vs. Arizona.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jordyn Tyson hauls it in for Arizona State TD) 2024/11/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Cam Skattebo barrels in for his 3rd TD of the game for Arizona State
videos.description: Cam Skattebo would not be denied as he tallies his third touchdown of the game for Arizona State vs. Arizona.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Cam Skattebo barrels in for his 3rd TD of the game for Arizona State) 2024/11/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Chamon Metayer makes the catch for Arizona State TD

videos.headline: Xavier Guillory makes the catch for Sun Devils TD
